2026-03-03PMODepartment of Fisheries and Oceans ActAppointment the Deputy Minister of Fisheries and OceansAppointment of Paul MacKinnon of Russell, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Fisheries and Oceans, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Fisheries and Oceans Act
subject: Appointment the Deputy Minister of Fisheries and Oceans
precis: Appointment of Paul MacKinnon of Russell, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Fisheries and Oceans, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
